shortDesc.message: Send YouTube to NotebookLM. Save videos, sync YouTube channel to NotebookLM, and manage any NotebookLM video easily

storeDesc.message:
🌐 With this powerful extension, you can easily connect YouTube and NotebookLM to create organized, AI-ready notes and summaries. It supports YouTube videos, playlists, channels, and even search results. The extension transforms your video-watching habits into a productive, research-driven workflow.

✅ Why You Need Youtube to NotebookLM?

1️⃣ Add any Youtube video to NotebookLM instantly
2️⃣ Send an entire Youtube playlist to notebook lm for bulk video research
3️⃣ Extract videos from a Youtube channel to notebooklm seamlessly
4️⃣ Turn your video research into actionable insights
5️⃣ Use Youtube search to notebooklm to batch-import search result videos

🔗 Whether it's educational content, tutorials, podcasts, or interviews – simply click to send NotebookLM video overview YouTube style!

⚡ Key Features You’ll Love:

💡 Add single or multiple videos from YouTube to NotebookLM app
💡 One-click to create notebook, or choose notebook from your existing list
💡 Extract summaries, timestamps, and AI highlights using notebooklm video overview
💡 Support for notebooklm video podcast content
💡 Quick access button in the browser for fast action

⚙️ More Than Just a Saver – It’s a Smart Research Assistant:

🎯 Turn your browser tab to notebooklm effortlessly
🎯 Extract ideas, arguments, key points from long-form videos
🎯 Use the extension to send a site tab to notebook lm, not just YouTube
🎯 Works with Notebook LM Plus for advanced AI-powered insights
🎯 Compatible with both light and dark themes

Notebook LM AI + YouTube = Smarter Learning

🧠 NotebookLM AI uses your saved videos to:

🔸 Generate contextual summaries
🔸 Create structured Q&A formats
🔸 Offer deeper insights from NotebookLM video overview
🔸 Help you build notebooks with long-term value
🔸 Sync video content across all your learning projects

This extension isn’t just a clipper — it's a bridge between video learning and structured knowledge capture using the technology.

Perfect for All Types of Learners:

💼 Students organizing lecture content
💼 Podcasters summarizing interview footage
💼 Researchers building video-based citations
💼 Creators looking for inspiration
💼 Anyone using NotebookLM for research videos

Just find a video, click, and you’re done — whether it's a single clip or an entire Youtube playlist to notebooklm.

Customization & Simplicity in One:

🔹 Choose to Create notebook or just Choose notebook from your list
🔹 Add NotebookLM source for smarter future search
🔹 Built-in support for NotebookLM Reddit

🎯 Looking to turn YouTube videos into actionable notes and summaries? The Youtube to Notebook LM extension is your ultimate tool for research, learning, and content organization.
🎯 In just one click, you can send any YouTube video to NotebookLM, including playlists, channels, and even search result pages!

⚒️ No matter how you learn or work, Notebook LM features ensure your NotebookLM YouTube experience is tailored to your needs.

👂 FAQ - Frequently Asked Questions

❓ What is Youtube to NotebookLM?
🧩 It’s a Chrome Extension that sends YouTube content (video, playlist, channel, or search result) to NotebookLM app for AI-powered summarization and note-taking.

❓ Can I use it with playlists and channels?
🧩 Yes! You can send a full Youtube playlist to notebooklm or an entire Youtube channel to notebooklm.

❓ Does it support search results?
🧩 Absolutely! Use Youtube search to notebooklm to bulk-send multiple results.

❓ Will NotebookLM summarize the videos?
🧩 Yes! The extension helps you access notebooklm video overview and summaries generated by NotebookLM AI 🧠

❓ Can I choose where to save my notes?
🧩 You can Create notebook or Choose notebook from your existing list – it’s completely flexible.

❓ What about browser tabs that aren’t YouTube?
🧩 You can send any site tab to notebooklm, not just YouTube. Perfect for additional context and source linking.

🌟 Make your video-watching smarter, faster, and more organized with Youtube to NotebookLM. The perfect solution for anyone serious about content digestion and research. Whether you're dealing with podcasts, lectures, documentaries, or vlogs — NotebookLM for research videos transforms how you think, learn, and remember.
